title: An Effective Stock Selection Method and Trading Strategy That Helped Me Grow $1K to $73K in Four Weeks
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
Beyond proud of this and just wanted to share. I did this to prove a point. To show people the power of options if you know what you’re doing. To show that it’s completely realistic and possible to go from small money to big money. Beginner traders will spend years throwing mine into their accounts thinking this time will be different. But they do the same thing with the larger money that keeps losing them the small money. This is proof for everyone and we’re about to do it all again. Not giving myself a 4 week target like the last one but we’ll see how quick we can scale it. We already brought $1k to $70k+ within 4 weeks being in out on most plays the same day. We now started the second $1k account challenge today and got it up 86.74%. 

Therefore, I have created a discussion group where, during my spare time, I share my watchlists, market observations, and risk analyses on a weekly basis. All content is completely free of charge; I do not provide trading signals, offer paid tools, or make any guarantees I simply discuss potential risks and specific entry points. This discussion group is entirely free to join; we are simply a community dedicated to mutual exchange and learning. If you are interested in joining, please feel free to send me a private message. I would be happy to share my investment strategies with you at no cost. However, I cannot guarantee that these strategies will be suitable for your specific circumstances; I merely hope that you will view them as a rational point of reference. Differing perspectives are perfectly normal, and we are all learning together.
